{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211345599EBC9F827D65C28FF444"}"},"total":70},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7444387845227725592","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得怪好看，主角互动蛮不错的
尤其是女帝认错和委屈的态度，可爱滴捏，就喜欢看这个呀
这哪是造反值，这是攻略进度条还差不多，做帝君同朝听政也算造反成功是吧[害羞]
希望后面互动越来越甜，以前看过一个女帝后期伴侣转君臣反目的，给哥们看吐了，希望作者he发展"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733285766,"group_id":"7432325907664079897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写自己喜欢写的，也希望自己所爱能被大家喜欢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/yo00Ig5rEw5Dvg4up6lkES8bQXFQrbfOQymPtgrJ3M","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e20b1ba111ac416aa0a01a63f90a4c7e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616663&x-signature=wDbYVNtjkbdpcEfDFJh6BNNdxKg%3D","user_id":"2500716906676984","user_name":"山丘上的樱见雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2500716906676984","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7432325907664079897","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主+低玄高武+朝堂谋略+现代发明+轻松搞笑+思想迪化）

　　我叫秦政，我穿越到九洲世界大武朝，觉醒造反系统。

　　我在死牢遇到系统认定的天命造反军师。

　　军师建议我先积蓄实力，有了实力再造反。

　　我听从了军师建议，在边境小县城疯狂发育。

　　可不知为什么，看到我势力越来越大，军师好像不太高兴......

　　......

　　我叫武明月，是大武朝女帝。

　　机缘巧合，我认识了一位年轻的治国之才。

　　我十分欣赏他，有用才之心。

　　可他一心只想造反！

　　他不知道我便是大武朝女帝，竟喊我军师，拉我一起造反......我反我自己？

　　朝纲不稳，正是用人之际，人才难得，我只好将计就计，先答应他一起造反，以后再慢慢改变他对我的偏见，让他为我所用。

　　我说服他先当个地方县令再徐图造反大计，他欣然应允。

　　可事情好像超出我的预期，一座县城的根基而已，他似乎真要发展成能威胁到大武朝的造反势力了，不妙不妙。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o882c79ef82fa413c7ff24b8d6eeb83a5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"十步杀一仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7432325907664079897","book_name":"把你当兄弟，你却是女帝？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7432326899369509401","read_count":"998","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"508917"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"239","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,单女主,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a7543c371ba36b9d2bb2de669bf435ee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255959&x-signature=9keNURGRKiN9BkAh4ln1dUaoytQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1908396727209143","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211345599EBC9F827D65C28FF444"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12144,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7302},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1733314542,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7443017065228682008","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常非常非常好看，人很少啊，有点可惜，作者加油！正常来说只要有人看这本书，至少也有9.0以上，前期内容幽默风趣，文笔也不错，有点可惜，希望可以有更多读者来观看，可惜了作者的才华呀！[快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732966745,"group_id":"7432325907664079897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ZPDFED428dZEH81KrAH5A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e3c8f61b119344c5b405fa1ea2c87048~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615134&x-signature=2%2F6dxmv7VdZMFfhk2QBZDCYm5RE%3D","user_id":"910832943503175","user_name":"落秋似锦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"910832943503175","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7432325907664079897","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主+低玄高武+朝堂谋略+现代发明+轻松搞笑+思想迪化）

　　军师建议我先积蓄实力，有了实力再造反。

　　我听从了军师建议，在边境小县城疯狂发育。

　　可不知为什么，看到我势力越来越大，军师好像不太高兴......

　　我十分欣赏他，有用才之心。

　　可他一心只想造反！

　　他不知道我便是大武朝女帝，竟喊我军师，拉我一起造反......我反我自己？

　　朝纲不稳，正是用人之际，人才难得，我只好将计就计，先答应他一起造反，以后再慢慢改变他对我的偏见，让他为我所用。
